scripts.deploy: serverless deploy --config serverless.yml --stage dev --region ap-southeast-1 --aws-profile $AWS_PROFILE --verbose && USAGE_PLAN_ID=$(aws apigateway get-usage-plans --region ap-southeast-1 --profile $AWS_PROFILE | jq -r '.items[] | select(.name | startswith("number-challenge-backend-dev")) | .id') && API_KEY=$(aws apigateway get-usage-plan-keys --usage-plan-id $USAGE_PLAN_ID --region ap-southeast-1 --profile $AWS_PROFILE | jq -r '.items[0].value') && sed -i '' 's|export NUXT_PUBLIC_API_KEY=.*|export NUXT_PUBLIC_API_KEY='$API_KEY'|' ../.env && echo 'API key updated in .env'
